overview.description: Display switch groups with optional legends, hints, and error messages
overview.purpose: Display switch groups with optional legends, hints, and error messages

examples.basic: <mc-switch-group legend="Please select" orientation="vertical" fit="medium" name="containers" value="" errormessage="" hint=""></mc-switch-group>

advanced.LegendWithTooltip:
// JavaScript import '@maersk-global/mds-components-core/mc-switch-group'; import '@maersk-global/mds-components-core/mc-switch'; import '@maersk-global/mds-components-core/mc-icon'; import '@maersk-global/mds-components-core/mc-tooltip'; // HTML

Vue3.basic:
<mc-switch-group
  legend="Please select"
  hiddenlegend
  orientation="horizontal"
  fit="small"
  autolayoutdisabled
  disabled
  invalid
  name="containers"
  @change="yourEventHandler(e)"
  value="value"
  errormessage="value"
  hint="value">
</mc-switch-group>

VanillaJs.basic:
<script type="module"
  src="./node_modules/@maersk-global/mds-components-core-switch-group/index.js"></script>

<mc-switch-group
  legend="Please select"
  hiddenlegend
  orientation="horizontal"
  fit="small"
  autolayoutdisabled
  disabled
  invalid
  name="containers"
  value="value"
  errormessage="value"
  hint="value">
</mc-switch-group>

<script>
  document.querySelector('mc-switch-group').addEventListener('change', (e) => yourEventHandler(e));
</script>

props.name: legend
props.description: Fieldset legend has to be passed as a property. Legend is required

props.name: hiddenlegend
props.description: Hides the group legend. The legend text will still be used as aria-label

props.name: autolayoutdisabled
props.description: By default, on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), the component's `orientation` is switched to vertical, regardless of the set orientation. However, setting `disabledautolayout` to `true` prevents this and preserves the current `orientation` setting.

props.name: invalid
props.description: If `true`, the border is red and the `errormessage` can be displayed if provided.

props.name: name
props.description: Name is required for the group component

props.name: value
props.description: The initial value of the component. It can be passed as a string (i.e. "2"), comma-separated string (i.e. "1,2") or as an array (i.e. ["1", "2"])

props.name: errormessage
props.description: Error message will be shown only if `invalid` attribute is set to `true`. Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot: ```error message as HTML``` Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text

props.name: hint
props.description: Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot: ```hint text as HTML``` Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text

events.name: change
events.description: Emitted when any of the mc-switch element in the group is checked/unchecked.

slots.description: Use the default slot, for passing switch items in the group. Check stories under Examples folder to see live example.
slots.example:
<mc-switch-group>
   <mc-switch name="number" value="One" label="One"></mc-switch>
    <mc-switch name="number" value="Two" label="Two"></mc-switch>
</mc-switch-group>

slots.description: Use the legend named slot, when you want to pass the legend as HTML. Check stories under Examples folder to see live example.
slots.name: legend

slots.description: Use the hint named slot, when you want to pass the hint as HTML. Check stories under Examples folder to see live example.
slots.name: hint

slots.description: Use the errormessage named slot, when in invalid state, you want to pass the error message as HTML. Check stories under Examples folder to see live example.
slots.name: errormessage

cssParts.description: Using this CSS part you can change the look of the The container of the fieldset that holds the switches. Check Examples -> Customised appearance story to see live example.
cssParts.name: fieldset-container
